projects.title: Projection
projects.subtitle: Financial Scenario Planner
projects.description: An offline-first personal finance scenario planner. Compare cash, debt balances, investments, and net worth across alternate plans with a deterministic month-step simulation engine. Free and open source.

projects.title: projection-ui
projects.subtitle: React Component Library
projects.description: A dark-first React component library and design token system extracted from Projection. Consumer-configurable theming via ThemeProvider — no hardcoded themes. Published to npm as @hannasage/projection-ui.

projects.title: Music Central
projects.subtitle: Music Catalog & Discovery
projects.description: This is my personal vinyl collection, managed by AI to keep track of albums, artists, and release dates. Browse through the catalog to explore what's on the shelves and discover new music.

projects.title: Spotify Agent
projects.subtitle: Terminal-based Spotify AI Buddy
projects.description: An intelligent agent that interacts with the Spotify API to provide personalized music recommendations and playlist management.
